bio: I'm a BS Computer Science student building toward a career in data science and AI/ML. Over the past year
I've been deliberately stacking practical skills — from SQL and Python to machine learning fundamentals — through structured coursework and hands-on projects.
name: Hassam Ali
tagline: Building toward a career in Data Science and AI/ML through coursework and hands-on projects.
title: BS Computer Science student - Learning Data Science & AI/ML
